title: Language Change - Houston Screen - Retry
scenario: Language change via Poly Studio Mobile app shows "Houston" error screen with retry option when firmware update fails due to headset power-off
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Pair and connect the Poly headset to the Android device via Bluetooth.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
5. Select a new language from the list of available languages.
6. Observe the prompt to update the device software in order to apply the language change.
7. Tap the update/confirm button to begin the firmware update process.
8. During the firmware update, turn off the Poly headset by pressing and holding the Power button.
9. Observe the error screen displayed on the app.
expected: A "Houston" error screen is displayed with a Retry option. Tapping Retry returns the user to the previous screen (Language selection or update prompt) to attempt the update again.
